fields.panel1_caption: asking your AI nicely not to help with malware
fields.panel2_caption: adding a system prompt that says 'please behave'
fields.panel3_caption: publishing a 0-to-10 Cyber Jailbreak Severity scoring rubric
fields.panel4_caption: bureaucratically certifying the apocalypse via cyber-safeguards@anthropic.com

narrative_summary: The joke escalates from naive AI safety measures to Anthropic's CJS framework, landing on the absurdity of formally scoring the end of civilization through an official email inbox.
rationale: Candidate 5 ties Candidate 3 on total but wins on surprise — 'bureaucratically certifying the apocalypse' is a genuinely fresh reframe that elevates the punchline beyond mere process-mockery, while the escalation from 'please behave' system prompt to civilizational sign-off email lands harder than Candidate 3's more literal recitation of real details.
story_title: More details on Fable 5's cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework
place: in a live coding interview that has already gone off the rails
hat_pair: foam keyboard worn flat as a hat with giant letter keys spelling HELP
